headline: Tech Leaders Split on AI's Role in Human Capability and Learning
body: Steve Wozniak recently told graduating students that human intelligence remains superior to artificial intelligence, while simultaneously, prominent voices like Sridhar Vembu are warning that AI tools like GPT are becoming a crutch that degrades human performance. The friction between AI enthusiasm and AI caution reflects a critical tension for healthcare systems implementing AI workflows. Healthcare organizations must carefully evaluate where AI augments clinician decision-making versus where it erodes the cognitive skills essential for safe patient care. As vendors expand AI capabilities across EHR platforms and clinical tools, this debate directly impacts how health systems should deploy these technologies to improve outcomes without creating dependency that undermines clinical judgment.
